docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT TORWAL, ROMAN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BASED ON STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP
